markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on Nginx content approvals, performance, and process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Nginx Content Advancing:** 4 of 7 Nginx articles are with Legal; the remaining 3 will follow today. Joel will overwrite Airtable with final, approved versions to create a single source of truth.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [**Performance Growing:** Key metrics are up 4–5 points weekly (e.g., visibility score for LLM models +2% to 16%), validating the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [**Process Refinement:** To improve AI output, Joel will provide structured feedback (e.g., "A → B" tables) for system prompt updates, replacing scattered Google Doc comments.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**New Survey Planned:** A survey on ChatGPT-referred traffic will ask users for their original prompt, aiming to uncover high-intent search queries.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)

## Topics

### Nginx Content Approvals

  - [Joel self-edited Nginx content to expedite the process, finding only minor tweaks were needed (e.g., "digital card" → "virtual card").](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [The team will not implement a formal approval workflow, keeping the process lean.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [**Current Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
      - [4 articles with Legal.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
      - [3 articles pending final internal edits (deadline: EOD today).](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
      - [No articles submitted to the bank yet.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [**Process Improvement:** To streamline reviews, Joel will create a single, "biblical" source of truth by overwriting the original Airtable docs with the final, approved versions.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

### Performance & Data

  - [Amplitude data shows consistent weekly growth across all topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [**Weekly Metric Comparison:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
      - [Visibility Score: 14% → 16% (LLM models)](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
      - [Other Metrics: 74→80, 93→98, 34→36](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [**New Data Initiative:** Joel's team is building a survey to capture the original ChatGPT prompt that led users to Engine's site.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
      - [**Goal:** Uncover high-intent search queries to better inform content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [**Method:** Trigger survey on traffic with the ChatGPT UTM parameter.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)

### Process & AI Output Feedback

  - [Joel's primary value from the partnership is offloading content work, as it is not his main focus.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [**AI Output Issues Identified:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
      - [**Out-of-Context Quotes:** Inserting irrelevant quotes (e.g., a FlexPro quote in an Nginx article) that break the narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
      - [**Overly Repetitive Language:** Over-correcting on feedback, such as stating "requires credit approval" every time "direct bill" is mentioned.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** Replace scattered Google Doc comments with structured feedback (e.g., "A → B" tables) to enable direct updates to the AI system prompt.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Joel:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
      - [Submit the final 3 Nginx articles to Legal today.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
      - [Overwrite Airtable docs with the final, approved Nginx content.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
      - [Share the structured Nginx feedback document.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)
  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [Consult the content team on the best format for structured feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
      - [Follow up on the "pending bank approval" items in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
      - [Discuss the survey prompt for ChatGPT-referred traffic in next week's meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd-sX1fGXsryNzDeHEzX-nrxzvwE4LD-?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
